subject: 🚀 Cursor Composer 2 cuts coding costs 50% with multi-file workflows
snippet: $0.50/M tokens standard mode, 61.3 CursorBench score, reinforcement learning trains on hundreds of actions Google adds Firebase + APIs to AI Studio coding agent, Microsoft releases MAI-Image-2, +115 text rendering score. Stay updated with t…
body_html:
$0.50/M tokens standard mode, 61.3 CursorBench score, reinforcement learning trains on hundreds of actions
Google adds Firebase + APIs to AI Studio coding agent, Microsoft releases MAI-Image-2, +115 text rendering score.
Stay updated with today’s top AI news, papers, and repos.
Signup | Work With Us | Follow on X

Hey Aikkara,

Your daily briefing is ready. You can finally take a break from the AI firehose.

Our algos spent the night splitting signal from noise and pulled the top news, models, papers, and repos.

Here’s the must-read:

Summary

Read time: 4 min 21 sec

Top News

▸ Cursor updates Composer model for multi-step coding workflows across projects

Top News

▸ Google adds full-stack app generation with persistent coding agents in AI Studio

Datadog

▸ Secure AI applications using Datadog best practices and infrastructure guidance

Top News

▸ Anthropic builds Claude Interviewer to interview 80K users on AI usage

Signals

▸ Anthropic adds Claude Code channels for Telegram and Discord control
▸ Perplexity integrates medical records and fitness data into AI workflows
▸ Ai2 releases open VLA evaluation harness for unified robot benchmark testing
▸ Lovable expands from app builder to general-purpose AI work assistant
▸ Microsoft launches MAI-Image-2 with improved 3D and text rendering capabilities
Today's Author
Lior Alexander. Founder of AlphaSignal and former ML Engineer. Previously built ML systems at Iguazio, Guesty, Enphase, Mila.
Top News
Cursor introduces Composer 2 with updated pricing tiers and a fast mode for lower latency execution
11,458 Likes

Cursor releases Composer 2, an updated coding model inside its IDE designed for multi-step development tasks. It combines continued pretraining (training further on large datasets) with reinforcement learning (learning from trial-and-error on coding tasks).

The model focuses on solving longer workflows that involve many actions across files, terminals, and tools.

Composer 2 targets developers who need an AI to handle extended coding tasks instead of single prompts. It runs directly inside Cursor and works across refactoring, debugging, and multi-file edits. The update improves benchmark performance while reducing token pricing.

Key features and results

  • Scores 61.3 on CursorBench, up from 44.2 in Composer 1.5 baseline

  • Reaches 61.7 on Terminal-Bench 2.0 for terminal-based coding task execution

  • Achieves 73.7 on SWE-bench Multilingual for multi-language bug fixing tasks

  • Uses continued pretraining to improve base model before reinforcement learning stage

  • Trains on long-horizon tasks requiring hundreds of sequential coding actions

  • Prices at $0.50/M input and $2.50/M output tokens in standard mode

  • Offers fast mode at $1.50/M input and $7.50/M output tokens
TRY COMPOSER 2
Top News
Google launches AI Studio update that generates full-stack apps with frontend, backend, and integrations from prompts
10,621 Likes

Google introduces a full-stack vibe coding system in AI Studio using the Antigravity agent and Firebase. You write prompts, and it generates working apps with frontend, backend, and integrations in one place.

The key change is a persistent agent that tracks your project and continues work across sessions.

What it does

It converts natural language into complete, runnable applications.

  • Generates UI (what users see) and backend (server logic) in one workflow

  • Supports real-time features like multiplayer state and live data updates

  • Connects apps to external services like maps, databases, or payments

  • Stores API keys securely using a built-in secrets manager

Why it matters

It removes manual setup across multiple tools and services.

  • Eliminates separate setup for hosting, database, and authentication systems

  • Reduces need to switch between frontend, backend, and infrastructure tools

  • Handles dependency installation and framework setup automatically

  • Maintains project context to reduce repeated instructions
START AI STUDIO
Presented by Datadog
Strengthen AI Security

Explore best practices for securing AI applications with guidance from Datadog.

Learn how to protect core infrastructure, application software and data, and the entry points that connect users to AI systems.
READ GUIDE
partner with us
Top News
Anthropic runs Claude-powered interviews with 80K users to map real-world AI usage patterns and concerns
6,728 Likes

Anthropic released a study where Claude runs structured interviews with 80,508 users across 159 countries and 70 languages to understand real AI usage and concerns. Instead of surveys, Claude asks questions and follows up based on answers, which captures detailed, open-ended responses.

The key idea: use an LLM as both interviewer and analyst to collect and structure qualitative data at scale.

Key findings 

The study shows how users apply AI across work, learning, and daily tasks.

  • 81% report AI already helped them move toward their goals

  • Productivity leads at 32%, mainly for coding and technical work acceleration

  • Cognitive support (17.2%) includes reasoning help and problem-solving assistance

  • Learning (9.9%) reflects self-paced education with AI as a tutor

Why it matters

This system replaces static surveys with adaptive AI-led interviews.

  • Claude Interviewer asks core questions, then generates follow-ups based on each response

  • Classifiers group answers into goals, concerns, and sentiment categories automatically

  • Human reviewers validate outputs and remove identifying information from responses

  • The setup captures “why” users behave a certain way, not just metrics
LEARN MORE
Signals
1 Anthropic introduces Claude Code channels to push messages and events from Telegram and Discord into sessions 21,248 Likes
2 Perplexity rolls out Health integrations to Pro users with access to connected personal health data 2,892 Likes
3 Ai2 releases open-source vla-evaluation-harness to standardize evaluation of VLA models across robot simulation benchmarks 1,726 Likes
4 Lovable acts as a general-purpose assistant for product, analysis, and content workflows in one system 1,631 Likes
5 Microsoft advances image generation with stronger 3D rendering, photorealism, and structured text output performance 1,028 Likes
At Alpha Signal, our mission is to build a sharp, engaged community focused on AI, machine learning, and cutting-edge language models, helping over 200,000 developers stay informed and ahead. We’re passionate about curating the best in AI, from top research and trending technical blogs to expert insights and tailored job opportunities. We keep you connected to the breakthroughs and discussions that matter, so you can stay in the loop without endless searching. We also work closely with partners who value the future of AI, including employers and advertisers who want to reach an audience as passionate about AI as we are.

Our partnerships are based on shared values of ethics, responsibility, and a commitment to building a better world through technology.Privacy is a priority at Alpha Signal. This policy applies across all Alpha Signal pages, outlining your rights and how to contact us if you want to adjust the use of your information. We’re based in the United States. By using our site, you agree to be governed by U.S. laws.
